details: Compound 9g, mp 207-209°C, DOI 10.1002/cmdc.202500751 confirmed; evidence quote located in §6.2.2.6 verbatim.
Table 1 row '2e m-CNC6H4 CH3- 47 116' located; compound code 2e and value 116 (°C implied by column) match; data_type measured.
Compound 17 (5-(3-Coumarinoyl)-2-methylpyridine) mp 200°C verified verbatim in Experimental section.
Compound 9c HCl salt; 'Hydrochloride m.p.199-202°C' verified verbatim; DOI 10.3390/60900784 confirmed.
Compound 2 (1-Methoxy-4-thiocyanatobenzene), 'brown solid mp. 33-44°C' located verbatim; wide range as printed.
Compound 3 (6-Methoxy-1-oxaspiro[4,5]deca-6,9-diene-8-one) 'Mp: 108-109 °C' verified verbatim.
Compound 6i (terpene-imatinib analogue), 'mp 121-124 °C' verified verbatim; DOI ph19020198 confirmed.
Compound 4a (6'-methoxy-pyrimido-androst-5-en-3β-ol) 'mp (acetone): 178-180 °C' verified verbatim; PMC6147017 confirmed.
Compound 13 (methyl benzoate w/ dioxoisoindolinyloxymethyl) 'm.p. 155-158 °C' verified verbatim.
Anthraquinone 'mp 284°' located verbatim in Spectral Data; paper's measured value reported with °C implied.
Compound 12b (triazole/bithiophene disulfide) 'mp: 119-121 °C' verified verbatim; PMC6264341 confirmed.
Compound 5j (6-(2-nitrobenzyl)-6H-benzo[c]chromene) 'Mp: 154 °C' verified verbatim.
1-Indanone 'mp 40°C' verified verbatim in Spectral Data of paper 60300279.

Chlorine dioxide values are from a Table 8.8 'Physical properties of chlorine dioxide' in a Pulp & Paper Industry review chapter (PMC7158184); this is a literature/reference table for a well-known commodity chemical, not a measurement by the chapter authors, so data_type='measured' is incorrect.
Compound 20 (ethyl 6-hydroxy-2-methylquinoline-3-carboxylate) 'm.p. 153-155 °C' verified verbatim.
Table 3 row '1f 39 178' verified verbatim; product 1f mp 178°C (°C from column header) measured value.
Compound 4a (1-(4-benzylpiperazin-1-yl)-4-phenylbutan-1-one) 'mp 166°C-168°C' verified verbatim in §4.2.1.7.
Compound 7c HCl salt; 'Hydrochloride m.p. 216-219°C' verified verbatim in paper 60900784.
Compound 9d HCl salt; the Experimental paragraph for 9d ending with 'Hydrochloride m.p. 203-205 °C' is in paper 60900784 verbatim; minor middle-of-quote spacing difference only.
Compound 2f (oxaphosphinine 2-oxide) 'm.p. 232-234 °C' verified verbatim in ijms25126327.
Compound 30 (N-(4-methylpiperidylamino)methylenebisphosphonic acid) 'mp. 225-228 °C' verified verbatim.

Paper prints 'mp: 256-58°C' (range shorthand) but value_raw is given as '256-258 °C' — the literal string '256-258' is not present in the evidence quote or paper text; quote should match paper's printed form.
L-lactide 'melting point of 98.1 °C' verified verbatim in Results section of polym18050655.
Compound 6e (terpene-imatinib analogue with myrtanyl group) 'mp 118-120 °C' verified verbatim.
4-(Pyridin-4-yl)benzaldehyde (compound 1) 'Mp 87-90 °C' verified verbatim as the paper's own measurement (lit. value cited separately as 87-88°C).
